title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 533.020 - Order of delivery
text:
533.020.  Order of delivery. — Upon filing such affidavit, the court, or judge or clerk in vacation, shall make an order requiring the defendant to deliver the property specified in the affidavit to the sheriff, and requiring the sheriff, if the same be not delivered to him, to take it from the defendant and deliver it to the plaintiff.
(RSMo 1939 § 1789) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1625; 1919 § 2073; 1909 § 2638 
(1974) Held, this section is not unconstitutional under Fuentes v. Florida and subsequent hearing in the replevin action satisfies due process. Associates Financial Services Company, Inc. v. Salky (A.), 510 S.W.2d 41.
